title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: SACAGAWEA HEALTH CENTER LEWIS & CLARK ELEMENTARY SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, including sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 1060 Eisenschmidt Lane Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Medical- Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4:30 Mental Health- Monday-Thursday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4:30pm Email - (800) 244-4870 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 244-4870 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Columbia County School Districts and St Helens School District SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4:30pm Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ASSISTER HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SACAGAWEA HEALTH CENTER LEWIS & CLARK ELEMENTARY SCHOOL SBHC
